---
title: "RES Field Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
params:
  field: "Sosyal-Beşeri ve İdari Bilimler Temel Alanı"
  output_dir: "05_Output"
  run_date: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
if (nzchar(params$run_date)) {
  run_date <- params$run_date
} else {
  run_date <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d")
}
field_safe <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", params$field)
report_dir <- file.path(params$output_dir, field_safe, run_date)
summary_path <- file.path(report_dir, "Metadata", "summary.json")
plots_dir <- file.path(report_dir, "Plots")
```

# Field: `r params$field`

```{r summary}
if (file.exists(summary_path)) {
  summary <- jsonlite::read_json(summary_path, simplifyVector = TRUE)
  knitr::kable(data.frame(
    Metric = c("N", "Research fields", "PERMANOVA R2", "PERMANOVA P", "PERMDISP P", "NMDS Stress", "Runtime"),
    Value = c(summary$N, summary$research_fields_count, summary$PERMANOVA_R2, summary$PERMANOVA_P, summary$PERMDISP_P, summary$Stress, summary$Runtime)
  ))
}
```

## NMDS

```{r nmds-plot, fig.cap="NMDS ordination"}
nmds_plot <- file.path(plots_dir, "nmds.png")
if (file.exists(nmds_plot)) knitr::include_graphics(nmds_plot)
```

## Envfit Vectors

```{r envfit-plot, fig.cap="ENVFIT vectors"}
envfit_plot <- file.path(plots_dir, "envfit_vectors.png")
if (file.exists(envfit_plot)) knitr::include_graphics(envfit_plot)
```

## Profile Heatmap

```{r heatmap-plot, fig.cap="Profile heatmap"}
heatmap_plot <- file.path(plots_dir, "profile_heatmap.png")
if (file.exists(heatmap_plot)) knitr::include_graphics(heatmap_plot)
```

## Tables

```{r tables}
perm_path <- file.path(report_dir, "Tables", "permanova.csv")
imp_path <- file.path(report_dir, "Tables", "importance.csv")
if (file.exists(perm_path)) {
  cat("### PERMANOVA\n")
  print(knitr::kable(read.csv(perm_path)))
}
if (file.exists(imp_path)) {
  cat("### Variable Importance\n")
  print(knitr::kable(read.csv(imp_path)))
}
```
